_instructions.critical: Only modify 'passes' field. Never change structure.
_instructions.workflow: One task at a time. Full verification. Commit after each.

phases.name: Dead Code & Bloat Removal
phases.goal: Delete unused code first - reduce noise before analysis

tasks.description: Remove unused state/props from AgentPanel.tsx
steps: SKIPPED: Analysis was incorrect - all identified items are actually used correctly
_onOpenChange is intentionally voided with void keyword (proper unused-vars handling)
setActiveProvider IS used - passed to HandlerContext at line 268
currentSessionId IS used inside callback at line 133 (dependency is correct)
Verified: npm run lint shows 0 errors for AgentPanel.tsx

tasks.description: Remove debug logging from watchlist delete endpoint
steps: Removed 3 DEBUG comments and excessive logging (item_id type, query result, all items dump)
Keep only essential error handling
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/api/watchlist.py - PASSED
Commit: 300deb21

phases.name: Security Audit
phases.goal: Zero critical security issues before refactoring

tasks.description: Fix unsafe JSON parsing in watchlist.py
steps: Created safe_json_loads() helper for flexible JSON parsing (lists/dicts)
Replaced 5 json.loads() calls with safe_json_loads() - lines 112-114, 244, 460, 665
All JSON parsing now handles JSONDecodeError gracefully
ruff check passed, 173 unit tests pass
Commit: d671b68d

tasks.description: Remove hardcoded IP address from AgentPanel.tsx
steps: Replaced hardcoded 192.168.8.233:444 with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUMMITFLOW_URL env var
Default fallback to https://dev.summitflow.dev
npm run lint passed (0 errors)
Commit: af584761

phases.name: DRY Consolidation
phases.goal: Eliminate duplicate code - extract to shared utils

tasks.description: Consolidate fragmented imports in market.py
steps: Consolidate 2 separate market_intelligence imports (lines 46-53) into single block
Consolidate 4 separate market_events_service imports (lines 57-60) into single block
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/api/market.py --fix
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff format app/api/market.py
Verify: Imports are clean and organized

tasks.description: Extract indicator enrichment pattern in market.py
steps: Create helper function _enrich_price_indicator(storage, key, symbol, data, actual_data_dates, health_score_data)
Replace 4 duplicate enrichment blocks (vix, sp500, tnx, dxy) at lines 254-286
Use loop: for key, symbol, data in [(vix,...), (sp500,...), ...]
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pytest tests/ -k market -x --tb=short
Verify: All tests pass, no duplicate code blocks

tasks.description: Extract cache invalidation helper in watchlist.py
steps: Create invalidate_watchlist_caches() helper function
Replace duplicate cache invalidation at lines 198-202 and 421-425
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/api/watchlist.py
Verify: Single source of truth for cache invalidation

tasks.description: Consolidate JSON parsing helpers in watchlist.py
steps: Use existing parse_json_field() from helpers.py for lines 111-125 in get_daily_report()
Use same helper for get_score_history() (lines 488-489)
Verify parse_json_field is imported correctly
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pytest tests/ -k watchlist -x --tb=short
Verify: No inline JSON parsing with try/except

tasks.description: Extract color threshold utilities in WatchlistTable.tsx
steps: Create frontend/lib/utils/colorThresholds.ts
Extract getScoreBadgeVariant, getDataQualityColor, getDataQualityBgColor (lines 210-235)
Consolidate into single scoreToVariant() and thresholdToColor() utilities
Update WatchlistTable.tsx to import from new file
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run build
Verify: Color logic is centralized and reusable

tasks.description: Extract SortableHeader component for WatchlistTable.tsx
steps: Extract repeated sortable header button pattern (appears 5x at line 356+)
Create inline SortableHeader component or extract to separate file
Replace duplicate buttons with <SortableHeader field='symbol' label='Symbol' />
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run build
Verify: No duplicate header button code

tasks.description: Extract session lookup logic in AgentPanel.tsx
steps: Session lookup sessions.find(s => s.id === currentSessionId) duplicated at lines 546-567
Extract to useCurrentSession() hook or memoized variable
Replace duplicate lookups with single reference
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run build
Verify: Single source of truth for current session

phases.name: Function Extraction
phases.goal: Break down oversized functions - all functions < 30 lines

tasks.description: Extract WebSocket message handler from AgentPanel.tsx connect()
steps: Extract ws.onmessage handler (lines 257-271) to setupWebSocketMessageHandler()
Extract HandlerContext creation into factory function
Reduce connect() callback from 70+ lines to ~30 lines
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run build
Verify: connect() is readable, message handling is isolated

tasks.description: Extract change detection hook from WatchlistTable.tsx
steps: Extract change detection useEffect (lines 276-340, 60 lines with nested timeouts)
Create useWatchlistChangeDetection(items) custom hook
Hook manages snapshots, timeouts, changedCells, recentlyUpdatedRows state
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run build
Verify: Main component effect reduced to hook call

tasks.description: Extract sorting logic from WatchlistTable.tsx
steps: Extract sortedItems logic (lines 122-170, 45 lines with switch statement)
Create sortWatchlistItems(items, field, direction) utility
Move to frontend/lib/utils/sortWatchlist.ts
Update WatchlistTable.tsx to use imported utility
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run build
Verify: Sorting logic is testable and reusable

tasks.description: Decompose review_strategy_signal in watchlist.py
steps: Promote nested _store_provider_review() to module-level helper (lines 688-726)
Promote nested _review_to_dict() to module-level or response_builders.py (lines 757+)
Extract _fetch_signal_data() helper (lines 642-681)
Reduce review_strategy_signal from 213 lines to <50 lines
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pytest tests/ -k review -x --tb=short
Verify: Function is readable, nested functions are gone

tasks.description: Fix return type annotation in celery_schedules.py
steps: Change return type from dict[str, object] to dict[str, dict[str, Any]]
Add: from typing import Any if not present
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pyright app/celery_schedules.py
Verify: No type errors, better IDE autocomplete

tasks.description: Replace runtime assertions with type narrowing in market.py
steps: Line 313: Replace assert isinstance(near_term, (int, float)) with cast()
Line 314: Replace assert isinstance(concentration, (int, float)) with cast()
Import cast from typing
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pyright app/api/market.py
Verify: No runtime assertions for type checking

tasks.description: Extract magic numbers in celery_schedules.py
steps: Add module-level constants: POLL_INTERVAL_60_SEC = 60.0, EXPIRY_2_MIN = 120, etc.
Replace hardcoded 60.0, 1800.0, 3600, 7200 throughout file
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/celery_schedules.py
Verify: No magic numbers, clear intent

tasks.description: Extract MARKET_SYMBOL constant in market.py
steps: Add constant: MARKET_SYMBOL = '__MARKET__' at module top
Replace hardcoded '__MARKET__' at lines 537, 555, and any other occurrences
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/api/market.py
Verify: No hardcoded symbol values

tasks.description: Extract risk config to constants in WatchlistTable.tsx
steps: Move riskConfig object (line 579) to frontend/lib/constants/riskLevels.ts
Export RISK_LEVELS constant with typed structure
Update WatchlistTable.tsx to import from constants
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run build
Verify: Risk levels are configurable constants

tasks.description: Run full backend lint and fix
steps: Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/ --fix
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff format app/
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pyright app/
Fix any remaining errors manually
Verify: Zero lint errors

tasks.description: Run full frontend lint and fix
steps: Run: cd frontend && npm run lint -- --fix
Run: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
Fix any remaining errors manually
Verify: Zero lint/type errors

phases.name: Final Verification
phases.goal: All checks pass, complexity targets met

tasks.description: Run full test suite and complexity check
steps: Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pytest -x --tb=short -q
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pyright app/
Run: cd frontend && npm run build
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint
Run: bash ~/portfolio-ai/scripts/restart.sh && sleep 3
Run: curl -s http://localhost:8001/api/projects/portfolio-ai/explorer/refactor-targets | jq '.summary'
Verify: high_priority_count reduced from initial 70
